member.summary: Enqueues or schedules background jobs.

member.summary: Provides distributed or in-memory caching behavior.

member.summary: Provides access to the current authenticated user context.

member.summary: Sends email messages through an external provider.

member.summary: Provides authentication and identity workflows for application handlers.

member.summary: Generates JWT access tokens.

member.summary: Sends SMS messages through an external provider.
